info.description: Tiqora ticket system API. Under active development — not production ready.

get.description: Only articles with ``is_visible_for_customer == 1`` — internal notes never returned.

schema.title: Response List Articles Api Portal Tickets  Ticket Id  Articles Get

get.description:
Resolve a rendered article body's ``cid:`` image reference.

Same ownership + ``is_visible_for_customer`` scoping as the numeric
attachment endpoint below; this is what ``rewrite_cid_urls`` targets for
portal-rendered article bodies (see ``domain.article_html``).
Sanitised article body — 404 unless owned by the customer and customer-visible.

delete.description:
Soft-deactivate (``valid = False``); matches the invariant used by
other admin CRUD resources (queues, states, ...) that are never hard-deleted.

get.description: Discovery endpoint the login page uses to decide which buttons to show.

SVG QR code for the pending enrollment's ``otpauth://`` URI.

404 if the caller has no pending enrollment (never called
``POST /totp/enroll``, or already confirmed one — re-enroll first).

post.description: Promote a pending-2FA session to a full session after a valid TOTP code.

get.description: Mint the Znuny-compatible subscription token for the current user.

get.description: Unauthenticated, token-gated read-only ICS subscription feed.

post.description: Receive one inbound SMS from the configured gateway driver.

Agent-triggered outbound SMS: appends an article and delivers via the
configured gateway (``channel.sms.outbound_webhook_url``).
Meta message delivery webhook (HMAC-SHA256 signed with the app secret).

get.description:
Server-sent event stream of ``tiqora:events`` pub/sub messages.

Requires an authenticated agent (same session/API-key auth as the rest
of ``/api/v1``). Each message forwarded is the raw JSON payload
published to Redis — see :mod:`tiqora.events.pubsub` for the two
message shapes (``ticket_changed`` / ``presence_changed``).

Response List Queues Api V1 Queues Get
Response Agent Workload Api V1 Stats Agent Workload Get

post.description: Create a new ticket. Requires ``create`` permission on the queue's group.

get.description:
Stream every ticket matching the same filters as ``GET /tickets`` as CSV.

Unlike the paginated list endpoint, this has no 200-row cap — rows are
streamed server-side (``TicketService.iter_tickets_for_export``) so
exporting a large queue stays memory-safe. Route registered *before*
``/{ticket_id}`` so FastAPI does not try to parse "export.csv" as a
ticket id.

patch.description: Apply one or more field mutations to a ticket.

schema.title: Response List Articles Api V1 Tickets  Ticket Id  Articles Get

post.description: Add an article to a ticket. Requires ``rw`` permission.

get.description: List form drafts for a ticket (current user only).

schema.title: Response List Drafts Api V1 Tickets  Ticket Id  Drafts Get

delete.description: Delete a draft for (ticket, user, action).

put.description: Create or update a draft for (ticket, user, action).

schema.title: Response Ticket History Api V1 Tickets  Ticket Id  History Get

post.description: Merge ticket_id into main_ticket_id. Requires ``rw`` on both queues.

get.description: Current viewers/composers on ``ticket_id`` (expired entries drop out via TTL).

schema.title: Response Get Presence Api V1 Tickets  Ticket Id  Presence Get

post.description: Record that ``user`` is viewing/composing on ``ticket_id`` (30s TTL).
Re-mount dynamic webservice routes without restart (authenticated).
